text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Arima Kinen. Though Narita
Brian is called the strongest, she says it's all
because of my help.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rising star Mayano Top Gun and recently
recovered Biwa Hayahide are also racing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With unwavering confidence, Narita Brian boldly
goes to face her rivals!
